name: Brainrot Craft
author: Poki
description: Brainrot Craft is a craft-and-merge game where you create the ultimate collection of Italian brainrot memes! Mix wild elements like cappuccino and ballerina to unlock chaotic combos like the legendary Ballerina Cappuccina. Discover all the iconic creations and watch the madness unfold! Ready to craft the craziest brainrot ever? How to play Brainrot Craft? Click or tap to set an item. Hold to move it. Who created Brainrot Craft? Brainrot Craft is created by Endless Pixels. Play their other games on Poki: Zombie Rush and Paper Block ! How can I play Brainrot Craft for free? You can play Brainrot Craft for free on Poki. Can I play Brainrot Craft on mobile devices and desktop? Brainrot Craft can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
